problem id: 3bdda816
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01100110 -> 00000001
  01111111 -> 10000001
  11111111 -> 10000011
  00011110 -> 00000000
  11000011 -> 10000011
  00100101 -> 10000000
  11100101 -> 10000011
  11100100 -> 00000011
  01011110 -> 00000001

query: 01011000
predicted answer: 00000001
